description: Identify the Standard Transportation Commodity Code (STCC), 49 CFR Hazard Class, and DOT Hazard Label for the five chemicals listed in '~/Desktop/rail_shipment_list.txt' using the CAMEO Chemicals website (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/). Save the results to '~/Documents/rail_manifest.json' as a list of JSON objects with keys: 'chemical', 'stcc_number', 'hazard_class', and 'hazard_label'.
